verdict: A solid, well-timed Medium chart with good rhythmic progression, held back by a couple of highly awkward eighth-note transitions.

issues.problem: The sequence 'JUMP LR -> U -> D -> L -> JUMP LR' at eighth-note speed is extremely awkward. It forces either a rapid double-tap with the left foot from Down to Left, or an intense, uncomfortable crossover with the right foot over to Left.
Repetition of the awkward 'JUMP LR -> U -> D -> L -> JUMP LR' eighth-note pattern, which disrupts the otherwise smooth flow of the drop section.
